commands.note: 4h->14h checkpoint (2026-06-02 03:30Z): regime-gate thesis trending INVALID. The last 12h were the BEST tape of the experiment (7 GREEN / 5 YELLOW / 0 RED) yet every gated v46 strategy lost MORE, not less: v46-v25-skip-red n=28 total -1.74 drop3 -3.00; v44-1s-ttp10-skip-red -2.12; acc-gate-skip-red -2.15; v25-green-only -1.62. Over the SAME window the ungated controls profited: v25-bot-excl-climbing +6.55 (n=496), v28 +4.09, v32 +3.24. Same strategies, same tape, only diff = the regime gate -> the gate is subtractive, removing net-positive trades and leaving a worse residual set. drop_top3 more negative than total everywhere = broad losses, no carrying winners. Losing in the gate's best-case regime contradicts the core 'trade green, skip red' hypothesis. Kill criterion (n>=100 and net_sol<0) not formally tripped; holding to n~50 for a well-powered verdict, but lean is INVALID.

4h->14h checkpoint (2026-06-02 03:30Z): n=28 total -1.74 drop3 -3.00 during a 7-GREEN/5-YELLOW/0-RED overnight. Ungated control v44-family + v25 profited over the same window. Regime gate appears subtractive. See v46-v25-skip-red note for the full cross-strategy comparison. Holding to n~50 then likely INVALID kill of the cohort.

4h->14h checkpoint (2026-06-02 03:30Z): worst of the skip_red set, n=28 total -2.12 drop3 -3.16, in the best (GREEN-heavy) tape of the experiment. Ungated controls positive same window. Regime gate not separating this strategy's winners from losers. Holding to n~50 then likely INVALID.

4h->14h checkpoint (2026-06-02 03:30Z): n=20 total -2.15 drop3 -2.79 during GREEN-heavy overnight. Deepened from -0.97 at the 4h check. Ungated acc-gate family positive same window. Regime gate subtractive. Holding to n~50 then likely INVALID.

4h->14h checkpoint (2026-06-02 03:30Z): the STRICTEST gate (only trades GREEN) is among the worst per-trade: n=15 total -1.62 drop3 -1.93. If anything the tighter the regime gate, the worse the result -- the opposite of the hypothesis. Strongest single evidence the universe GREEN/RED label does not separate this strategy's good trades from bad. Candidate for earliest kill of the v46 cohort.
